items.title: NHTSA recall 26V315000 — EQUIPMENT:OTHER:LABELS (Model Y)
items.body: Tesla, Inc. (Tesla) is recalling certain 2025-2026 Model Y vehicles. The certification label may not have been installed. As such, these vehicles fail to comply with the requirements of 49 C.F.R. Part 567, "Certification
